murder.text: heard someone got done in over by the park last night. cops were crawling all over the place.
word is they found the body on the north end. real messy scene, lots of yellow tape.

dead.text: yeah someone turned up dead near the old grove. couldn't believe it when I heard.
the dead guy — nobody seems to know who he was. but a couple people saw things go down.

body.text: they found the body just off the path by the north park entrance. still had his wallet on him.
whoever did this didn't even try to hide the body. left him right there in the open.

crime.text: crime scene was taped off for hours. I heard two people came forward as witnesses.
the crime report mentioned two key witnesses. one lives nearby, the other was just passing through.

killed.text: someone got killed right out in the open. a woman who lives on the block saw part of it.
whoever killed that guy took off in a car. at least one person got a look at it.

police.text: police said they're looking for a tall guy. that's about all they'll say publicly.
police talked to two witnesses so far. one named annabel, the other caught the getaway car.

scene.text: the scene was on the north side, near the park. happened late, not many people around.
at the scene they found some kind of membership card fragment. couldn't read much off it.

evidence.text: only real evidence so far is witness statements and a partial plate number from a car.
they found a torn piece of a gym membership card near the scene. that's all I know.

witness.text: two witnesses came forward. one's a woman named annabel who lives on maple street, right near where it happened.
the other witness was across the road. saw a car peel out — blue sedan, older model.

witnesses.text: both witnesses saw different things. annabel saw the guy up close. the other one caught the car.
neither witness knew the attacker. but between the two of them, there's enough to narrow it down.

annabel.text: annabel? yeah she lives over on maple street, third floor. she was coming home when she saw it all.
annabel said the guy was real tall. she noticed he dropped something — looked like a membership card from a gym.

saw.text: she saw a tall man running from the scene. big guy, hard to miss even in the dark.
the other person saw the car — said it was a blue honda, maybe a civic. caught the first few characters of the plate.

heard.text: I heard annabel was the main witness. she's shaken up but she gave a good description.
heard the getaway car was a honda. dark blue, nothing fancy. the plate started with 4PC something.

maple.text: maple street, yeah. annabel's been living there for years. she was the one who called it in.
the whole block on maple was crawling with cops after. annabel's the only one who'd talk though.

street.text: happened right off the street near the park. not well lit over there at night.
annabel lives on maple street. she saw the whole thing from her window and ran down.

park.text: the park on the north end. that's where they found him. real quiet area after dark.
near the park entrance, that's where the car was parked. peeled out heading east.

north.text: north side of town, by the park. not a lot of foot traffic that late.
the north park area. annabel lives a couple blocks from there on maple.

car.text: someone saw a blue sedan tear out of there. older model honda, looked like a civic.
the car had a plate starting with 4PC. couldn't get the rest, it was moving too fast.

honda.text: blue honda, probably a civic. not new, maybe early 2000s. the witness was pretty sure about the make.
how many people drive blue hondas in this town? fewer than you'd think. cops are checking registrations.

civic.text: a civic, yeah. dark blue. the kind of car that doesn't stand out — which is probably the point.
blue civic with a plate starting 4PC. if you cross that with gym memberships, you'd probably find your guy.

blue.text: the car was blue. dark blue, not bright. a honda civic, the witness said.
blue sedan, heading east out of the park area. partial plate was 4PC-something.

sedan.text: blue sedan. four doors. looked like a civic or an accord. the witness leaned toward civic.
that sedan was booked. whoever was driving didn't plan on being seen.

plate.text: partial plate — 4PC, that's all they got. the rest was covered in mud or something.
4PC is the start of the plate. cross-reference that with blue hondas and you'll have a short list.

license.text: license plate started with 4PC. cops are running it through the system now.
even a partial license narrows it down a lot when you combine it with the vehicle description.

suspect.text: the suspect is a tall man. annabel got a decent look at him before he took off.
whoever it is, he's got a gym membership. that card fragment they found by the body was from fitness galaxy.

man.text: big man, tall. that's what annabel kept saying. hard to tell much else in the dark.
a man driving a blue honda civic. tall, gym member. that's the profile they're working with.

tall.text: annabel said he was definitely tall. stood out even at a distance.
tall guy with a gym card and a blue civic. how many people match all three?

gym.text: the membership card was from a gym — fitness galaxy, the one on the east side.
gym membership, blue honda, tall build. that's your guy. someone at fitness galaxy would know.

fitness.text: fitness galaxy. that's the gym on the card. not a huge place, they'd know their members.
if you check the fitness galaxy member list against blue honda owners... I'd bet you get one name.

membership.text: a gym membership card, torn up. but you could still read 'fitness galaxy' on it.
that membership card is the key. combine it with the vehicle and the description, there's only one match.

galaxy.text: fitness galaxy, over on the east end. small gym, regulars only. shouldn't be hard to check their list.
one name comes up when you cross fitness galaxy members with blue civic owners. just one.

jeremy.text: jeremy... yeah, I've seen him around. big guy, works out at that gym on the east side.
jeremy bowers. drives a blue civic. member at fitness galaxy. you do the math.

bowers.text: bowers? he lives a few blocks from the park. always seemed like a quiet dude. guess not.
if it's bowers you're looking at, everything lines up. the car, the gym, the description. all of it.

clue.text: you want a clue? talk about what happened. someone might overhear and chime in.
clues are all around you. mention the crime, the witnesses, the car. see what comes back.

help.text: try talking about the murder. or the witnesses. someone here knows something.
start with what you know. a body was found. two witnesses. a car. a gym card. follow the trail.

investigate.text: start at the scene. work your way through the witnesses. check the car, check the gym.
the investigation path: scene to witnesses to vehicle to gym membership. it all converges on one person.

solve.text: think you know who did it? just say their name. if you're right, they'll have no choice but to confess.
to solve it, name the killer. first and last name. say it out loud and see what happens.

confession: ...you got me. I did it. All of it.
should've left town when I had the chance.
